# Test that bd formula --help surfaces the primitive-discoverability pointers.
#
# Failure of any of these assertions means an agent reading 'bd formula --help'
# would not be told that 'bd formula schema' / 'bd formula primitives' /
# examples/formulas/primitives/ exist. That is the exact failure mode GH#3621
# is closing, so this test is the regression gate.
bd formula --help
stdout 'bd formula schema'
stdout 'bd formula primitives'
stdout 'examples/formulas/primitives/'
stdout 'website/docs/workflows/formulas.md'

# The list and show subcommands also point at the schema index so agents
# arriving via either subcommand find the primitive surface.
bd formula list --help
stdout 'bd formula schema'

bd formula show --help
stdout 'bd formula schema'
